name: Eun-su
overview: When a watch goes missing, Jo Eun-su spots a mysterious customer and boldly tracks him down. She then visits her mother, who shows troubling signs at home.

name: Hui-su
overview: Jo Hui-su endures years of relentless abuse from Noh Jin-pyo, despite attempts to escape. When she reaches a breaking point, Eun-su steps into action.

name: Eun-su, Hui-su and Jin-pyo
overview: After witnessing Hui-su's mistreatment, Eun-su teams up with her to stop Jin-pyo — recruiting one of Jin So-baek's employees to execute their plan.

name: Eun-su and Hui-su
overview: A confrontation with Jin-pyo forces Eun-su and Hui-su to hurry and cover their tracks. But in trying to be thorough, they navigate several obstacles.

name: Eun-su and Hui-su and Jin So-baek
overview: With their problem seemingly over, Eun-su and Hui-su attempt to rebuild their lives. But trouble soon finds Eun-su — and So-baek unexpectedly appears.

name: Eun-su, Hui-su and Jang Kang
overview: An unexpected visitor terrifies Hui-su, forcing her and Eun-su to handle a new crisis. Meanwhile, So-baek begins to question their strange behavior.

name: Eun-su, Hui-su and Jin-young
overview: With Noh Jin-young on Eun-su and Hui-su's tails, So-baek offers his help. But Eun-su takes matters into her own hands, putting everyone in jeopardy.

name: Eun-su, Hui-su and Us
overview: Pressured by Jin-young, Hui-su does the unthinkable. Can Eun-su find a way out of their hellish situation and finally break the cycle?
